NIBBIT.observed_in: Floor 2, Act 1 -- single fixed 12-damage attack every turn, no buffs seen across the fight.

SNAPPING_JAXFRUIT.observed_in: Floor 8, Act 1 -- turn 1 intent showed simultaneous Attack(3)+Buff; killed before a second buff turn resolved, so buff_strength=2 is an approximate placeholder, not directly measured.

FUZZY_WURM_CRAWLER.observed_in: Floors 5 and 15, Act 1 (fought twice) -- base attack opens at 3, a single Buff turn granted +7 Strength (confirmed via STRENGTH_POWER amount:7 in game state), and the next attack card showed as 11 total (base 4 + 7 Strength), matching the shared Strength-scaling formula.

SHRINKER_BEETLE.observed_in: Floors 2 and 15, Act 1 (fought twice, HP varied 38-40 across instances, 40 used here) -- turn 1 always a pure debuff (applies a 'Shrink' effect reducing the player's outgoing damage by 30% while the beetle lives; the real percentage is 30%, but v1 simplifies this to 1 stack of the same standard 25% Weak used everywhere else in the simulator, documented approximation). Attack sequence 7 then 13 was observed directly; no Strength buff was visible so the jump to 13 is left as an explicit fixed second value rather than invented via a buff mechanic we didn't see. Cycle repeats the 13-damage attack after round 3 (not independently confirmed beyond round 3).

CUBEX_CONSTRUCT.observed_in: Floor 12, Act 1 -- turn 1 pure buff (+2 Strength), subsequent turns combine a 7-base attack with another +2 Strength (matches observed 9 then 11 damage as Strength accumulated to 2 then 4). Also has an Artifact (blocks first debuff applied to it) in the real fight -- NOT modeled in v1, documented simplification, makes this monster slightly easier for the trained policy than the real encounter. spire-codex also lists this monster under 'Act 3 - Glory' -- not modeled here since we only have Act 1 first-hand stats for it.

TRACKER_RUBY_RAIDER.display_name: 劫掠者追踪手 (Ruby Raider - Tracker)
TRACKER_RUBY_RAIDER.observed_in: Floor 9, Act 1 (Ruby Raider trio encounter) -- turn 1 intent was a generic 'strategy/debuff' with no visible effect text; modeled as 1 stack of the standard 25% Weak applied to the player as an approximate stand-in. Turn 2's 8-hit, 1-damage-each attack (8 total) was directly observed.

CROSSBOW_RUBY_RAIDER.observed_in: Floor 9, Act 1 (Ruby Raider trio encounter) -- turn 1 defended for 3 block (observed directly in game state), turn 2 attacked for 14.

ASSASSIN_RUBY_RAIDER.observed_in: Floor 9, Act 1 (Ruby Raider trio encounter) -- attacked for 10 on turn 1; killed that same turn so no further turns were observed.
